title: Scroll Area
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Scroll Area wrapper composed from the local Base UI Scroll Area primitive, shadcn slot attributes, base-nova class tokens, local class canonicalization, and deterministic local examples.

registry.reason: shadcn Scroll Area composes the local Base UI Scroll Area primitive.
Scroll Area examples use the local shadcn Separator wrapper.
shadcn Scroll Area uses the local class composition helper.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native wrapper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema through wrapper style options and the local Base UI dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React primitive is replaced by the local Foldkit primitive.
Origin horizontal artwork example uses Next Image; installable source renders equivalent image markup with Foldkit Html.
Origin RTL example dependency is fixture evidence only and is replaced by local static RTL data.
React fragments and component state are origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

examples.title: ScrollAreaDemo
examples.description: Default vertical tag list Scroll Area demo.
examples.snippet:
export const ScrollAreaDemo = (): Html =>
  ScrollArea<never>({
    rootId: originRootId,
    state: verticalOverflowState,
    className: 'h-72 w-48 rounded-md border',
    children: [tagsContent('Tags')],
  })

examples.title: ScrollAreaHorizontalDemo
examples.description: Horizontal artwork Scroll Area demo with local image markup.

examples.title: ScrollAreaRtl
examples.description: RTL tag list Scroll Area demo with local Arabic strings.

deviations.summary: The wrapper composes local Scroll Area attributes instead of importing upstream Base UI React primitives.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source must not import React or upstream Base UI runtime packages.

deviations.summary: The horizontal artwork example renders local img markup instead of Next Image.
deviations.rationale: Installable registry examples cannot depend on Next.js. The local markup preserves the image, alt, sizing, and figure structure relevant to parity.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local Arabic strings instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Static RTL data preserves the rendered direction and content needed by fixtures.

deviations.summary: Scrollbar visibility and thumb dimensions come from local Base UI deterministic state helpers instead of live ResizeObserver measurement.
deviations.rationale: This keeps the wrapper pure and delegates browser measurement to consuming commands or future shared measurement infrastructure.
